cards.name: Queen of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: generous, caring, nurturing, homebody, good business sense, practical, comforting, welcoming, sensible, luxurious

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition

cards.name: King of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: greed, materialistic, wasteful, chauvanist, poor financial decisions, gambler, exploitative, possessive
